pull_requests.summary: Implements comprehensive ProgressService class with unified API for tracking user progress, streaks, achievements, analytics, and data export capabilities.

pull_requests.title: 🎭 Phase C: Character Demo & Showcase (Builds on A+B)
pull_requests.author: AustinOrphan
pull_requests.summary: Phase C of Character Generation Epic - creates comprehensive demo and showcase page demonstrating all character system capabilities with interactive gallery, customization preview, and performance metrics.

pull_requests.title: 🎨 Phase B: Character Customization Interface (Builds on A)
pull_requests.author: AustinOrphan
pull_requests.summary: Phase B of Character Generation Epic - implements comprehensive character customization system with wizard-based interface, 4-step guided process, real-time preview, and mobile-responsive design.

pull_requests.title: 🎭 Phase A: Character System Testing & Integration (Foundation)
pull_requests.author: AustinOrphan
pull_requests.summary: Phase A of Character Generation Epic - provides foundation for character system testing and integration with enhanced SubjectTemplateLoader, character integration testing, and backwards compatibility.

pull_requests.title: Phase 1 B1: Mobile-First Responsive Design System
pull_requests.author: AustinOrphan
pull_requests.summary: Implements comprehensive mobile-first responsive design system with touch-optimized components, mobile navigation, responsive grid, and accessibility improvements.

pull_requests.title: feat: enhance CI/CD pipeline with deployment automation (Phase 1 C1)
pull_requests.author: AustinOrphan
pull_requests.summary: Comprehensive CI/CD pipeline enhancements with automated deployment, GitHub Pages deployment, semantic versioning, pre-commit hooks, and dependency update automation.

pull_requests.title: feat: implement comprehensive progress tracking system (Phase 1 A1)
pull_requests.author: AustinOrphan
pull_requests.summary: Comprehensive progress tracking system with dashboard, charts, achievements, streaks, goals, and reports. Real-time visualization with Chart.js integration and mobile-responsive design.

pull_requests.title: Phase 0.4: Backend Integration Preparation
pull_requests.author: AustinOrphan
pull_requests.summary: Creates comprehensive foundation for backend integration with repository pattern architecture, standardized data models, storage configuration system, migration tools, and error handling framework.

pull_requests.title: Phase 0.3: Multi-User Support and Family Management
pull_requests.author: AustinOrphan
pull_requests.summary: Implements comprehensive multi-user support and family management features including family management modal, visual user switcher, add child form, and enhanced authentication service.

pull_requests.title: feat: Phase 0.2 - Account Management System
pull_requests.author: AustinOrphan
pull_requests.summary: Implements account management system with security questions, password reset system, enhanced AuthService, and complete multi-step password reset flow.

pull_requests.title: feat: Phase 0.1 - User Authentication System
pull_requests.author: AustinOrphan
pull_requests.summary: Implements complete authentication foundation with AuthService, login/registration forms, tabbed modal interface, enhanced navigation, and mobile-responsive design.

pull_requests.author: AustinOrphan
pull_requests.summary: CRITICAL SECURITY FIX - Resolves XSS vulnerability in Modal component message handling through HTML escaping utility, modal content sanitization, and template security updates.
